visual_description:
A low-angle, static shot captures a dark, wooden trestle bridge at night. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a desperate and violent confrontation. It begins with a loud, percussive, and metallic clang, as if a heavy structure is being struck or collapsing. A bright, fiery explosion erupts on the left side of the frame, sending sparks and smoke billowing upwards. The intricate, dark silhouette of the bridge's truss structure dominates the right side of the screen. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. This is immediately followed by a high-pitched, piercing, and frantic scream, filled with terror and panic.

The camera cuts to a shaky, close-up shot of a group of people running frantically along the wooden planks of the bridge. The lighting is dim and chaotic, casting long shadows. In the foreground, a man with a determined expression runs towards the camera. Behind him, other figures, including a man with long dark hair and a woman with a distressed look, follow in a panicked rush. The camera movement is unsteady, enhancing the sense of urgency and chaos. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner. The sounds of frantic movement
